title: UK-Norway, Iceland, and Liechtenstein FTA Committee on Sanitary and Phytosanitary measures: joint minutes, 25 November 2024
body: "Joint minutes of the second meeting of the Committee on Sanitary and Phytosanitary measures under the free trade agreement between the UK and Norway, Iceland, and Liechtenstein, which took place virtually on 25 November 2024.  "

taxons.title: Customs declarations, duties and tariffs (import and export)
